data.name: Blade or Balls 🧝‍♀️🧌
data.detailed_description:
A demoness warrior’s secret name is the only weapon that works against her. But surely her secret is safe with her sisters, isn’t it? That’s not how demons play, however, and that’s how the ogre came to stand before her. Her secret, his weapon. Her body, his plaything. And her rage and betrayal easily succeeded by her natural penchant for lust and fucking!

Key Features

• Visual Novel about sexual adventures of fantasy girls with demonic creatures

• Exciting porn story written by a nymphomaniac woman

• Animated and 100% uncensored sex scenes of Dark Elf fucked by Ogre

• 4K Ultra HD (3840x2160 pixels) resolution graphic

• Elf Girl's and Monster's hot moans and the environmental ambiance sounds

• Name your characters to make this story your personal one

• LOVENSE sex toys support for unforgettable pleasure & satisfaction

WISHLIST & FOLLOW FOR UPDATES!

data.short_description: A demoness warrior with a secret name. An ogre with a secret spell he got from a bribe. Now the two of them are facing off in forgotten ruins, but only one can be proclaimed the winner. And will it be by blade or by balls that the winner is declared?
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: Pentium® 4 1.5 GHz / Athlon®
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GPU capable of showing images and video
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX® 9 compatible

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6
  • 處理器: Apple M1 or Intel Core M
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GPU capable of showing images and video
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX® 9 compatible

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
